title: Developer Portfolio | Mihail Kirkov
text: MihailKResume🇬🇧 ENMihail Kirkov21 years old • 👨‍💻 Developer • 📍 Vienna, AustriaFull-stack web developer specializing in building performant and scalable applications using React, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript backends. Also experienced with PHP and Python for robust API and backend development.View ProjectsContact MeScroll to exploreAbout MeI love working with React and TypeScript on the frontend, and I’m just as comfortable on the backend with tools like Node.js, PHP, or Python. I care about writing clean, maintainable code and designing smooth experiences that people actually enjoy using.I started coding when I was 10, attending C++ classes for about five years. During that time, I even assisted my teacher in running a C# summer course. Afterward, I completed courses in Python and full-stack web development, which solidified my passion for building complete applications—from backend to frontend.GitHubLinkedInTechnical SkillsLoading skills...Featured ProjectsLoading projects...Work ExperienceLoading experience...Get In TouchEmailmihailkirkov04@gmail.comGitHub@MihailKirkovLinkedIn@Mihail-KirkovNameEmailSubjectMessageSend Message

title: Full Stack Developer
text:
Role: Full Stack Developer
Company: Gutes-Set GmbH
Period: Feb 2024 - current
I officially began my full-stack development career at this fast-paced startup, contributing to projects from initial concept to production deployment. I collaborated in agile teams of up to five developers, took the lead on several projects, and developed some on my own. My work focused on building frontends with React and TypeScript, sometimes NextJS, and developing backend services primarily in PHP, often extending and integrating with the Dolibarr ERP API. Additionally, I explored AI automation by training a custom model using Mistral AI and integrating it into internal workflows.

title: Izlei – Anonymous Posting Platform
text:
Title: Izlei – Anonymous Posting Platform
A freelance project developed in collaboration with a colleague for a Bulgarian client using Next.js. Izlei is a web application where users can create and read anonymous posts. We implemented a custom admin dashboard that allows moderators to approve, deny, edit, or delete posts, ensuring content moderation and platform integrity.

title: Blog Posting App
text:
Title: Blog Posting App
I built this website while i was learning Python Backend technologies. It is a fully functional website where users can interact with any blog posts and connect their social media accounts, such as FaceBook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.
